task: Implement TH4.E3.US3 repo dogfooding experiment harness
summary: Added a repo-local dogfooding harness for graph lab with committed manifests, illustrative baseline artifacts, documentation, and tests while preserving valid customized lab manifests during graph lab init.

decisions.summary: Preserve valid customized lab manifests during graph lab init
decisions.rationale: Repo-specific dogfooding manifests should survive init instead of being reset to the empty scaffold.

decisions.summary: Commit a tiny illustrative repo dogfooding baseline under .graph/lab
decisions.rationale: The story asks for a reproducible repo-first example harness and baseline artifacts without overstating claims from a tiny sample.

changed_artifacts.summary: Preserve valid customized suite and condition manifests during lab init; only refresh invalid or stale manifests.
Added regression coverage for preserving valid customized manifests during lab init.
Added repo-level tests for the committed dogfooding harness, docs, and baseline report limitations.
Added repo-local suite, conditions, baseline manifest, helper script, sample run/evaluation/report artifacts, and supporting documentation links for the dogfooding experiment.
Documented the end-to-end repo dogfooding flow and explicit sample-size limitations.
Documented the graph lab command surface and linked the repo dogfooding example.

follow_up.summary: Expand the repo dogfooding suite beyond two tasks and a single seed before drawing stronger empirical conclusions.
